title: Customer Support Copilot AI Output
description: Structured recommendation returned by the copilot for a single customer support ticket.

category.description: Exactly one supported category or Out of scope.

customer_issue_summary.description: One to three plain-language sentences summarizing the customer's issue.

suggested_reply.description: A conservative draft reply for a human agent to review and edit before sending.

policy_source_used.description: The policy, support guidance, or fallback source used for the recommendation.

missing_information.description: Information still needed before a human agent can proceed confidently.

escalation_decision.description: Whether the case should be escalated for further human review.

escalation_reason.description: Short explanation for the escalation decision.

examples.customer_issue_summary: The customer wants a refund after a late delivery and says the item is no longer needed.
examples.suggested_reply: Thanks for reaching out, and I'm sorry for the delay. I can help review your refund request. Please share your order number and confirm whether you still have the item so our team can review the next steps.
missing_information: Whether the item was kept or returned
examples.escalation_reason: This appears to be a standard supported refund request and the frontline agent can gather the remaining information.
